backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (theme, logo, sticky header, hamburger menu, menu section, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, border, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Header, HeroSection, MenuSection, CateringSection, ContactSection, and Footer into a single-page layout.
Catering services section displaying event type offerings, a banner image, an included-items checklist, and a CTA button scrolling to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section featuring Jasmine Cota's profile card with a clickable phone number, service area, and availability details styled with warm Mexican-inspired colors.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with the business logo, quick navigation links, contact info (Jasmine Cota, phone, Phoenix AZ), copyright, and a 'Made with love in Phoenix, AZ' tagline.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with a logo, desktop nav links, phone number, and a hamburger mobile menu that hides on scroll-down and closes on outside click or Escape key.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, logo, tagline, CTA buttons to explore the menu or book catering via phone, and a scroll-down indicator.
frontend/src/components/MenuSection.tsx: Displays a grid of menu item cards (chicken tacos, beef tacos, burritos) with images, descriptions, ingredient badges, and signature dish labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for this static frontend.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollDirection.ts: Custom hook that tracks scroll direction (up/down/none), current scroll position, and whether the page is at the top, using requestAnimationFrame for performance.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining a Mexican-inspired OKLCH color palette via CSS variables for both light and dark themes, plus Tailwind utility classes for fonts, textures, and gradients.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom Mexican-inspired color palettes (chili, sienna, gold, verde, cream), custom fonts (Playfair Display, Dancing Script, Montserrat), box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor (version 3) for 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking', a Mexican catering/restaurant website for Phoenix, AZ, documenting existing features, image requirements, architectural notes, and known issues for build planning.
